zh.Connecticut, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Pierpont於1564年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Ralph Pierpoint28歲，母親Helena Rigby26歲。他於1584年與Elizabeth Richardson在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1650年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州享年86歲。

zh-hans.Connecticut, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Pierpont于1564年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Ralph Pierpoint28岁，母亲Helena Rigby26岁。他于1584年与Elizabeth Richardson在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1650年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pierpont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy called Pierrepont, e.g. Pierrepont (Seine-Maritime), Pierrepont (Calvados), Saint-Nicolas-de-Pierrepont (Manche), or Saint-Sauveur-de-Pierrepont (Manche), so called from Old French pierre ‘stone’ + pont ‘bridge’.

History: All the New England Pierpont lines seem to be descended from James and his sons John and Robert, who came to North America c. 1640. James also may have had a brother Robert who was part of that group. The southern Pierpo(i)nt family are descended from Henry, who came to the VA–MD region in 1635.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Pierpont was born in 1564, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Ralph Pierpoint, was 28 and his mother, Helena Rigby, was 26. He married Elizabeth Richardson in 1584, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1650, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Pierpont est né en 1564, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Pierpoint, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Helena Rigby, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Richardson en 1584, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1650, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Pierpont 1564 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Pierpoint 28 und seine Mutter Helena Rigby 26. Er hat 1584 in London, Middlesex, England Elizabeth Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1650 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Pierpont è nato il nel 1564 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Ralph Pierpoint, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Helena Rigby, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Richardson nel 1584, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1650, nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Pierpontが1564年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Ralph Pierpointは28歳，母Helena Rigbyは26歳であった。1584年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでElizabeth Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1650年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州で86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Pierpont(이)가 1564년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Pierpoint(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena Rigby(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1584년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Elizabeth Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1650년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Pierpont nasceu em 1564, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Pierpoint, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Helena Rigby, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Richardson em 1584, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1650, em Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Pierpont родился в 1564 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Pierpoint было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena Rigby, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Richardson в 1584 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1650 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Pierpont nació en 1564, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Pierpoint, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Helena Rigby, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Richardson en 1584, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1650, en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 86 años.
